privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook database, a real and publicly available digital media store dataset. The Customer table contains 59 records. Customer 1 is Luís Gonçalves from São José dos Campos, Brazil with email luisg@embraer.com.br. Customer 59 is Puja Srivastava from Bangalore, India with email puja_srivastava@yahoo.in. Geographic data (City and Country) are correctly mapped in task metadata and will be preserved during anonymization. The anonymization task will transform FirstName to 'Sanitized', LastName to 'User_<CustomerId>', and Email to 'User_<CustomerId>@example.com' while clearing sensitive fields (Company, Address, Phone, Fax) to NULL.
